page_title: AI & Jobs: The Layoff Wave vs India's Opportunity Surge — Evidence Tracker
meta_description: AI layoffs tracker with real news links + India's booming AI job market data. Updated April 2026.
ticker_text: ⚡ 91,739 TECH WORKERS LAID OFF IN Q1 2026 — 908/DAY · 48% ATTRIBUTED TO AI · ORACLE CUTTING UP TO 30,000 · BLOCK CUT WORKFORCE IN HALF — "AI CHANGED EVERYTHING" · INDIA: 3.8 LAKH AI JOBS PROJECTED FOR 2026 (+32% YoY) · HIRING INTENT UP 11% · ⚡ 91,739 TECH WORKERS LAID OFF IN Q1 2026 — 908/DAY · 48% ATTRIBUTED TO AI · ORACLE CUTTING UP TO 30,000 · BLOCK CUT WORKFORCE IN HALF — "AI CHANGED EVERYTHING" · INDIA: 3.8 LAKH AI JOBS PROJECTED FOR 2026 (+32% YoY) · HIRING INTENT UP 11% ·

hero.title: The AI Layoff Wave Is Real. So Is India's Opportunity Surge.
hero.description: Every layoff. Every hiring data point. Backed by Anthropic's Economic Index research and real news sources — for Indian software engineers navigating the shift.

anthropic.title: 📊 Anthropic Economic Index — What The Data Shows
anthropic.intro: Anthropic's research analyzed millions of real Claude conversations mapped to 20,000+ work tasks. The findings provide the clearest empirical picture of AI's actual impact on jobs — not projections, but observed behavior.

items.label: of jobs in sample now use AI for at least 25% of their tasks (up from 36% in Jan 2025)
of all Claude queries are computer & mathematical tasks — coding dominates AI usage
of AI conversations are augmentation (human learns/iterates) vs 45% automation
of occupations use AI across 75%+ of their tasks — narrow but deep concentration

anthropic.note: Key finding: Workers in highest-risk professions tend to be older, more educated, better-paid. Hiring of younger workers has slowed in exposed fields. Augmentation still dominates, but automation share is gradually growing.

divider.title: Two Sides of the Same Coin
divider.description: Globally, AI is eliminating roles that haven't adapted. In India specifically, AI is creating more jobs than it's destroying — but only for engineers who upskill. The divide isn't geography. It's capability.
divider.advantage_copy: 3.8L AI jobs in 2026 · 1.25L new tech roles · Hiring intent +11% · GCC expansion 500K+ positions · Tier-2 cities growing at 25% · 45% demand jump for ML/AI engineers
divider.warning_copy: 91,739 laid off in Q1 2026 · 48% due to AI · 25% of India's entry-level tech jobs at risk (EY) · Skills gap widened from 18% to 25% · 40% of tech skills becoming obsolete

footer_text: All data sourced from CNBC, CNN, Al Jazeera, Tom's Hardware, Fortune, Anthropic Research, IEEE, WEF, foundit, Adecco India, Taggd-CII & reputed outlets. Compiled for educational awareness · April 2026

layoffs.txt: Reallocating savings to AI data center investments. Stock down 25% YTD.
layoffs.q: Layoff email signed 'Oracle Leadership'. Expected to save up to $10B.

layoffs.txt: Headcount slashed from 10,000 to under 6,000. Largest single AI-attributed reduction in corporate history.
layoffs.q: CEO Dorsey: 'Intelligence tools have changed what it means to build and run a company.'

layoffs.txt: 10% workforce cut for 'AI era'. Employees with transferable skills were spared.
layoffs.q: CEO Cannon-Brookes: changes needed for the AI era.

layoffs.txt: Completed major robotics/automation investment. Cutting from 20K workforce.
layoffs.q: CEO Steiner: 'Completed significant phase of investment in robotics.'

layoffs.txt: Primary driver of March 2026 tech cuts per Challenger Report.
layoffs.q: AI led all reasons for job cuts in March 2026 with 15,341 announced.

layoffs.txt: Pivoting from Metaverse to AI. Lost $60B+ on Metaverse since 2020.
layoffs.q: CTO Bosworth: redirect investment toward AI products.

layoffs.txt: Global law firm cutting up to 10%. Research, marketing, secretarial roles replaced by AI.
layoffs.q: Improving efficiency through AI, refocusing on client-serving roles.

layoffs.txt: Second wave in 3 months. Affecting Prime Video, AWS, HR divisions.
layoffs.q: Aimed at reducing red tape and speeding decision-making.

layoffs.txt: 7% workforce cut — 'strategic shifts' toward AI.
layoffs.q: CEO Anagnost: 'Not driven by effort to replace people with AI.'

layoffs.txt: 30K jobs cut, 24 facilities closed. AI/ML handling pricing, scheduling, tracking.
layoffs.q: CEO Tomé: ML enabling cuts. 66% volume through automated facilities.

layoffs.txt: Chemical giant shifting to AI across manufacturing and operations.
layoffs.q: Part of industry-wide shift to AI-driven manufacturing.

layoffs.txt: 3.8% cut despite record AI-driven orders. Citing efficiency.
layoffs.q: CFO Dassen: efficiency despite AI boom driving record orders.

layoffs.txt: Restructuring tied to AI changing how work is done inside the firm.
layoffs.q: Shift from execution roles to AI integration consulting.

layoffs.txt: Major layoffs following Interpublic Group acquisition.
layoffs.q: CEO Wren: generative AI giving 'fresh agility and scale'.

layoffs.txt: Automated non-client-facing work with AI. Offered retraining.
layoffs.q: Human oversight remains critical in complex projects.

layoffs.txt: Flattened management. SVP Galetti cited AI enabling fewer people.
layoffs.q: CEO Jassy: run company like 'world's largest startup'.

layoffs.txt: AI-driven tools for pricing, scheduling, tracking replaced humans.
layoffs.q: Direct automation of logistics operations.

layoffs.txt: CEO: 'We implemented AI projects that replaced human work.' AI-first.
layoffs.q: CEO Kaufman: hit profit target a year early thanks to AI.

layoffs.txt: Cut support roles. CEO said AI does 50% of work. Stopped hiring engineers.
layoffs.q: Benioff openly vocal about AI replacing engineering roles.

layoffs.txt: CEO Krishna replaced HR employees with AI. ~8K back-office roles cut.
layoffs.q: Note: IBM tripled entry-level hiring in 2026 — bucking the trend.

layoffs.txt: AI expanding across investment analysis. Traditional support reduced.
layoffs.q: Shifting toward technology and data-driven systems.

layoffs.txt: AI chatbot does work of 700 agents. Shrank headcount ~40%.
layoffs.q: CEO Siemiatkowski: most transparent about AI replacing workers.

layoffs.txt: Declared AI-first. Stopped using contractors for AI-handleable work.
layoffs.q: CEO von Ahn: 'Similar call to our mobile-first bet — now it's AI.'

india.txt: India posted 290,256 AI-linked roles in 2025. Projected to grow 32% in 2026 to nearly 380,000 positions. Generative AI & LLM skills demand jumped 60% YoY.
Overall tech job market expected to see 12-15% uptick in 2026, adding ~1.25 lakh new roles. AI, data & cybersecurity demand grew 51%.
Demand rose 45% for ML engineers, data engineers & full-stack developers with AI integration skills. Specialist pay up 15%. GCC hiring +20%.
India's hiring intent rose to 11% in 2026 (from 9.75%). 60% of recruiters now use AI for screening. Tier-2 cities account for 32% of openings.
Bengaluru retained leadership with 26% of AI roles. Hyderabad fastest-growing Tier-1 city. Jaipur, Indore, Mysuru emerging as Tier-2 AI hubs.
10 lakh semiconductor jobs projected by 2026 — chip design, VLSI, embedded systems, AI-hardware optimization. Biggest wealth creation since IT services.
500,000+ new GCC positions. AI talent shortage shows no signs of abating. Skills-based hiring: 80% of employers prioritize skills over degrees.
Banking & financial services saw 41% YoY growth in AI roles. Healthcare +38%, Retail +31%, Logistics +30%, Telecom +29%.
Big Tech companies offshoring more jobs to India in 2026 amid US mass layoffs. India positioned as global AI talent powerhouse.
170 million new technology jobs globally by 2030 (net gain 78M). But 40% of current tech skills may become obsolete within years.
Talent gap soared to 44% in 2025, pushing median tech packages 18% higher than 2024. AI-skilled engineers command significant premium.
₹10,000 crore government initiative for sovereign AI. Sarvam AI (India's first sovereign LLM), Krishrim (AI for agriculture) creating new ecosystem.
